my_thoughts: Remaking RM_03. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The structural_analogy mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is testing_ontological_boundaries—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: T4 (Final): Student 'Is the witness-consciousness the real Self?'—now testing ontological boundaries. Episode complete after 4 turns, moving from testing ethical implications to testing ontological boundaries. Teaching arc used structural analogy in REMAKING phase to address asks for categorical status, seeks definition. Student progressed through 4-turn teaching sequence.
visible_response:
It is the reflection of the real in the mind (buddhi).
The real is beyond. The witness is the door through which you pass beyond.
